detail_html:
Nivea Men & Women Deodorant Roll-On

Product Highlights:

- Antiperspirant care

- No ethyl alcohol

- Suitable for all skin types

- Roll-on format for easy application

- Enriched with targeted ingredients for specific benefits

- Comes in a range of fragrances to suit different preferences

How to use:

- Apply evenly on underarms

- Allow to dry completely before getting dressed

- Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin

Extra Whitening RENAMED Extra Brightening

- Enriched with 10 skin nutrients to nourish, repair and whiten underarm skin.

- The optimal combination of reliability, beauty and care.

- Tightens pores and smoothens skin with skin nutrients and vitamins.

- 48h anti-perspirant protection and gentle NIVEA care.

- Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

- Alcohol-free.

Fresh Energy

- Offers energetic freshness that you can feel all day long.

- Works with a new fresh, highly-effective formula enriched with energizing lemongrass.

- 48h anti-perspirant protection and gentle NIVEA care.

- Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

- Alcohol-free.

Black & White

- No white marks on black clothing & anti-yellow staining on white clothing.

- Prevents deo stains on skin and clothes.

- 48h anti-perspirant protection and gentle NIVEA care.

- Dermatologically tested and approved.

- Dry and fresh all day.

- Alcohol-free.

Fresh Natural

- 48h effective anti-perspirant protection and gentle NIVEA care.

- Skin tolerance dermatologically approved.

- Without alcohol or colourants.

Dry Comfort

- Powerful protection tested in real life situations.

- Dual Active formula with 2 anti-perspirant actives for a long-lasting dry feeling.

- Reliable 48 hour anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin.

- No ethyl alcohol.

- Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

Pearl & Beauty

- Smooth & beautiful underarms, contains pearl extract.

- Reliable 48h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin.

- No ethyl alcohol.

- Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

* "Please be aware that the design and color of our bottles may vary from time to time due to shipment factors."

product.desc:
Nivea Men & Women Deodorant Roll-On

Product Highlights:

- Antiperspirant care

- No ethyl alcohol

- Suitable for all skin types

- Roll-on format for easy application

- Enriched with targeted ingredients for specific benefits

- Comes in a range of fragrances to suit different preferences

How to use:

- Apply evenly on underarms

- Allow to dry completely before getting dressed

- Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin

Extra Whitening RENAMED Extra Brightening

- Enriched with 10 skin nutrients to nourish, repair and whiten underarm skin.

- The optimal combination of reliability, beauty and care.

- Tightens pores and smoothens skin with skin nutrients and vitamins.

- 48h anti-perspirant protection and gentle NIVEA care.

- Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

- Alcohol-free.

Fresh Energy

- Offers energetic freshness that you can feel all day long.

- Works with a new fresh, highly-effective formula enriched with energizing lemongrass.

- 48h anti-perspirant protection and gentle NIVEA care.

- Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

- Alcohol-free.

Black & White

- No white marks on black clothing & anti-yellow staining on white clothing.

- Prevents deo stains on skin and clothes.

- 48h anti-perspirant protection and gentle NIVEA care.

- Dermatologically tested and approved.

- Dry and fresh all day.

- Alcohol-free.

Fresh Natural

- 48h effective anti-perspirant protection and gentle NIVEA care.

- Skin tolerance dermatologically approved.

- Without alcohol or colourants.

Dry Comfort

- Powerful protection tested in real life situations.

- Dual Active formula with 2 anti-perspirant actives for a long-lasting dry feeling.

- Reliable 48 hour anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin.

- No ethyl alcohol.

- Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

Pearl & Beauty

- Smooth & beautiful underarms, contains pearl extract.

- Reliable 48h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin.

- No ethyl alcohol.

- Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

* "Please be aware that the design and color of our bottles may vary from time to time due to shipment factors."

Prevents irritation with chamomile extract & avocado oil. ⊳ Men B&W Invisible Original: White mark protection on black clothing & anti-yellow staining on white clothing. 72H anti-perspirant protection, no ethyl alcohol & dermatologically proven. ⊳ Men Silver Protect: Fights body odour, with anti-bacterial formula containing silver ions. 72H anti-perspirant protection, no ethyl alcohol & dermatologically proven. ⊳ Men Dry Impact: 72H anti-perspirant protection. Dual Protect formula with two antibacterial actives & 0% ethyl alcohol. detail_html:
⊳ Dry Comfort:

72H anti-perspirant protection. Dual Protect formula with two antibacterial actives & 0% ethyl alcohol. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ B&W Invisible Silky Smooth:

Offers x5 protection against odour, sweat, stains, residues, and irritation. No ethyl alcohol & dermatologically proven.

⊳ B&W Invisible Clear:

White mark protection for black clothes. Anti-yellow staining for white clothes, keeping them white for longer. 48H effective anti-perspirant protection, no ethyl alcohol & dermatologically proven.

⊳ Extra Bright Radiant & Smooth:

72H anti-perspirant protection. Brightens & smoothens for beautiful, healthy looking skin. No ethyl alcohol & dermatologically proven.

⊳ Pearl & Beauty:

Gives smooth & beautiful underarms - contains pearl extracts. Day long odour protection & gentle NIVEA care. Feminine long lasting fragrance. No ethyl alcohol & dermatologically proven.

⊳ Double Effect:

The double effect formula allows for a closer shave by keeping skin smooth and soft while keeping you fully protected against perspiration. It protects you for 48 hours against sweat and body odour with its caring ingredients for soft feeling skin. Dermatologically approved & alcohol-free.

⊳ Fresh Natural:

48h deodorant protection. NIVEA Fresh Natural INFINIFRESH gives long lasting fresh skin effect for hours, with ocean extracts. Scientifically proven to actively fight odour causing bacteria & providing a choice of amazing fragrance. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Fresh Energy:

72H anti-perspirant protection. Unique NIVEA INFINIFRESH formula: for long lasting freshness. No ethyl alcohol & dermatologically proven.

⊳ Protect & Care:

Day long odour control & gentle NIVEA care, with the fragrance of NIVEA creme. For a soft skin feeling. Contains 0% alcohol & dermatologically proven.

⊳ Men Sensitive Protect:

Offers 5-fold protection against odour, sweat, burning, itchiness & dry skin. Prevents irritation with chamomile extract & avocado oil.

⊳ Men B&W Invisible Original:

White mark protection on black clothing & anti-yellow staining on white clothing. 72H anti-perspirant protection, no ethyl alcohol & dermatologically proven.

⊳ Men Silver Protect:

Fights body odour, with anti-bacterial formula containing silver ions. 72H anti-perspirant protection, no ethyl alcohol & dermatologically proven.

⊳ Men Dry Impact:

72H anti-perspirant protection. Dual Protect formula with two antibacterial actives & 0% ethyl alcohol. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Men Fresh Active:

Unique NIVEA INFINIFRESH formula: for long lasting freshness, with ocean extracts. 48H deodorant protection & dermatologically proven.

⊳ Men Cool Kick:

Kick of invigorating freshness with Cool-Care formula. 72H anti-perspirant protection, no ethyl alcohol & dermatologically proven.

⊳ Men Protect & Care:

Long-lasting freshness & body odour protection with no skin irritation, with a woody masculine scent. 0% Alcohol & NIVEA MEN Care Complex. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Men Deep:

DEEP MAXXTECH formula with black carbon & masculine scent DARKWOOD. Reducing bacteria by more than 99.9%. Skin active protection. Long-lasting fragrance. No visible black residue. 72H anti-perspirant protection & dermatologically proven.

product.desc:
⊳ Dry Comfort:

72H anti-perspirant protection. Dual Protect formula with two antibacterial actives & 0% ethyl alcohol. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ B&W Invisible Silky Smooth:

Offers x5 protection against odour, sweat, stains, residues, and irritation. No ethyl alcohol & dermatologically proven.

⊳ B&W Invisible Clear:

White mark protection for black clothes. Anti-yellow staining for white clothes, keeping them white for longer. 48H effective anti-perspirant protection, no ethyl alcohol & dermatologically proven.

⊳ Extra Bright Radiant & Smooth:

72H anti-perspirant protection. Brightens & smoothens for beautiful, healthy looking skin. No ethyl alcohol & dermatologically proven.

⊳ Pearl & Beauty:

Gives smooth & beautiful underarms - contains pearl extracts. Day long odour protection & gentle NIVEA care. Feminine long lasting fragrance. No ethyl alcohol & dermatologically proven.

⊳ Double Effect:

The double effect formula allows for a closer shave by keeping skin smooth and soft while keeping you fully protected against perspiration. It protects you for 48 hours against sweat and body odour with its caring ingredients for soft feeling skin. Dermatologically approved & alcohol-free.

⊳ Fresh Natural:

48h deodorant protection. NIVEA Fresh Natural INFINIFRESH gives long lasting fresh skin effect for hours, with ocean extracts. Scientifically proven to actively fight odour causing bacteria & providing a choice of amazing fragrance. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Fresh Energy:

72H anti-perspirant protection. Unique NIVEA INFINIFRESH formula: for long lasting freshness. No ethyl alcohol & dermatologically proven.

⊳ Protect & Care:

Day long odour control & gentle NIVEA care, with the fragrance of NIVEA creme. For a soft skin feeling. Contains 0% alcohol & dermatologically proven.

⊳ Men Sensitive Protect:

Offers 5-fold protection against odour, sweat, burning, itchiness & dry skin. Prevents irritation with chamomile extract & avocado oil.

⊳ Men B&W Invisible Original:

White mark protection on black clothing & anti-yellow staining on white clothing. 72H anti-perspirant protection, no ethyl alcohol & dermatologically proven.

⊳ Men Silver Protect:

Fights body odour, with anti-bacterial formula containing silver ions. 72H anti-perspirant protection, no ethyl alcohol & dermatologically proven.

⊳ Men Dry Impact:

72H anti-perspirant protection. Dual Protect formula with two antibacterial actives & 0% ethyl alcohol. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Men Fresh Active:

Unique NIVEA INFINIFRESH formula: for long lasting freshness, with ocean extracts. 48H deodorant protection & dermatologically proven.

⊳ Men Cool Kick:

Kick of invigorating freshness with Cool-Care formula. 72H anti-perspirant protection, no ethyl alcohol & dermatologically proven.

⊳ Men Protect & Care:

Long-lasting freshness & body odour protection with no skin irritation, with a woody masculine scent. 0% Alcohol & NIVEA MEN Care Complex. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Men Deep:

DEEP MAXXTECH formula with black carbon & masculine scent DARKWOOD. Reducing bacteria by more than 99.9%. Skin active protection. Long-lasting fragrance. No visible black residue. 72H anti-perspirant protection & dermatologically proven.

title: sebamed Sensitive Skin Fresh Deodorant Active 50ml
detail_text: Our sebamed Deodorant contains no metal derivatives that can clog up pores and irritate the skin. This “intelligent” deodorant removes body odour through biological action. It is available in two forms; spray or roll on for ease of application. BENEFITS - Contains alcohol for cool & fresh feeling - Balances skin pH at 5.5 to eliminate body odour - Light formula that does not stain, rapidly absorbed - Does not damage skin - Non-comedogenic HOW TO USE Remove cap. Hold roller against skin. Roll-on and apply.
detail_html:
Our sebamed Deodorant contains no metal derivatives that can clog up pores and irritate the skin. This “intelligent” deodorant removes body odour through biological action. It is available in two forms; spray or roll on for ease of application.

BENEFITS

- Contains alcohol for cool & fresh feeling

- Balances skin pH at 5.5 to eliminate body odour

- Light formula that does not stain, rapidly absorbed

- Does not damage skin

- Non-comedogenic

HOW TO USE

Remove cap. Hold roller against skin. Roll-on and apply.

detail_text: NIVEA Roll On Deodorant Anti-Perspirant 50ml | Men & Women Variants | 72H Protection | Freshness & Underarm Care Stay fresh, dry and confident all day with the NIVEA Roll On Anti-Perspirant range for men and women. Designed to provide reliable sweat and odour protection while caring for underarm skin, with multiple variants to suit every lifestyle and preference. Choose from refreshing, antibacterial, whitening, extra dry, invisible protection and skin-caring formulas. ✨ Available Men Variants: •Black & White Invisible •Silver Protect •Dry Impact •Cool Kick •Fresh Active •Deep Darkwood ✨ Available Women Variants: •Stress Protect •Extra Bright Radiant & Smooth •Extra Bright Happy Shave •Fresh Energy •Protect & Care •Dry Comfort •Fresh Natural •Pearl & Beauty •Black & White Clear 💪 Key Features: •Up to 72H anti-perspirant protection •Helps reduce sweat and body odour •Smooth roll-on application •Gentle on underarm skin •Fast-drying formula •Suitable for daily use •Multiple scents & skincare benefits

Stay fresh, dry and confident all day with the NIVEA Roll On Anti-Perspirant range for men and women. Designed to provide reliable sweat and odour protection while caring for underarm skin, with multiple variants to suit every lifestyle and preference.

product.desc:
NIVEA Roll On Deodorant Anti-Perspirant 50ml | Men & Women Variants | 72H Protection | Freshness & Underarm Care

Stay fresh, dry and confident all day with the NIVEA Roll On Anti-Perspirant range for men and women. Designed to provide reliable sweat and odour protection while caring for underarm skin, with multiple variants to suit every lifestyle and preference.

Choose from refreshing, antibacterial, whitening, extra dry, invisible protection and skin-caring formulas.

✨ Available Men Variants:

•Black & White Invisible 

•Silver Protect 

•Dry Impact 

•Cool Kick 

•Fresh Active 

•Deep Darkwood 

✨ Available Women Variants:

•Stress Protect 

•Extra Bright Radiant & Smooth 

•Extra Bright Happy Shave 

•Fresh Energy 

•Protect & Care 

•Dry Comfort 

•Fresh Natural 

•Pearl & Beauty 

•Black & White Clear 

💪 Key Features:

•Up to 72H anti-perspirant protection 

•Helps reduce sweat and body odour 

•Smooth roll-on application 

•Gentle on underarm skin 

•Fast-drying formula 

•Suitable for daily use 

•Multiple scents & skincare benefits
product.title: NIVEA Deodorant Roll On Anti-Perspirant 50ml Men/Women Body Deo Invisible Roll-on

title: [SG SELLER] GRACE Natural Crystal Deodorant 70G
detail_text: Grace deodorant does not contain alcohol, does not clog pores, does not stain clothes, completely harmless to the body. Its action is based on inhibition of bacteria that cause unpleasant odor. Deodorant can be used for the treatment of damaged skin for disinfection. Thai plant extracts contained facilitate removal of irritation. Deodorant is very economical, you can use it for several years. How It Works? Crystal salt is a product designed to prevent body odor. It works by creating a barrier that is hostile to odor-causing bacteria. Crystal salt acts on body odor by preventing it from developing, rather than masking it. HOW TO USE: Use after a shower , wet skin area then apply deodorant, rub on the trouble spots and leave to dry naturally. NET.W 70G

No harmful chemicals, oil perfume, or emusifiers.

Simply wet the deodorant with water and apply underarm.

After use, please do wash/clean and let to dry.

Net weight: 70G

page_json.name: (SG) Grace Crystal Deodorant
page_json.description: GRACE. Marks and Spencer Deodorant: This long-lasting deodorant ensures that your desks and spencer freshly smell fresh all day long. Aluminium Free Deodorant: A long-lasting formula that contains no metals. Organic Deodorant Women: Our natural deodorant is designed to keep you fresh and gives you the right amount of freshness. Deodorant Roll on Women: Women, girls, ladies, men. Our deodorant for women comes in a wide variety of colors to choose from. Natural Deodorant Women: Formulated to create a natural smell that is perfect for everyday use

title: (Bundle of 3) Dove Original Deodorant Roll On 50ml (Women) - Top Secret Beauty
detail_text: Specifications BrandDoveSKU3067377573_SGAMZ-20926586552Body Care BenefitsLong-Lasting Freshness,Odour Control,Anti-Bacterial,Sweat Control / AntiperspirantIngredient PreferenceVitamin ERecommended UserWomenSpecial ClaimsCruelty-FreeFormulation FeaturesAluminium-Free,Non-Sticky/Greasy FormulaProduct FormRoll-on Qualification License Type SG_HSA License Code Highlights About Provides up to 72h sweat and odour protection Helps to reduce underarm skin irritation after shaving Delicate scent helps to keep you feeling clean Glides on easily Moisturises to care for your underarm skin Contains ¼ moisturising cream for beautifully soft and smooth underarms How to use: Put one arm up above your head and apply to your skin using a circular motion and a light pressure When one underarm has a thin layer on it, repeat the process on the other underarm. product.highlights:
• About
  • Provides up to 72h sweat and odour protection
  • Helps to reduce underarm skin irritation after shaving
  • Delicate scent helps to keep you feeling clean
  • Glides on easily
  • Moisturises to care for your underarm skin
  • Contains ¼ moisturising cream for beautifully soft and smooth underarms

  • How to use:
  • Put one arm up above your head and apply to your skin using a circular motion and a light pressure
  • When one underarm has a thin layer on it, repeat the process on the other underarm.

title: Blunies Ultra Brightening Deodorant - New Formula & Look!
detail_text: Blunies Ultra Brightening Deodorant is an ultra collagen roll-on deodorant anti-perspirant that brightens, smoothens underarm skin, and accelerates skin renewal. It is powered by supercharged brightening skincare ingredients like rainbow algae (cywhite compound), probiotics, aloe vera, probiotics, hyaluronic acid and AHAs. Our lightweight, quick-drying formula helps with conditioning and moisturising skin while neutralising odour. It also exfoliates and smoothens out bumpy skin. ✓ New & Improved Formula ✓ Brightens and Smoothens ✓ Neutralises Odour ✓ Fast-Absorbing ✓ Stain-Free ✓ Long-Lasting ✓ Reduces Fine Lines ✓ 48-Hour Protection ✓ 20x More Powerful Collagen ✓ Plant-Based Collagen ✓ Provides Relief After Hair Removal Fragrance Description Fresh Jill & Aloe Vera: Sweet, floral and refreshing with juicy pear notes, for all-day lasting freshness. Lavender & White Tea: Calming lavender with slightly citrusy notes of white tea. It is an airy delicate scent. Sakura Blossom: Sweet and refreshing with h ints of blooming sakuras, cherries and rose. How to use Apply daily to clean and dry underarms For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Store in a cool place and avoid direct sunlight. Frequency Apply as needed. Amount Apply 2-3 strokes starting from the centre of your underarms and swipe outwards. Results Blunies Ultra Brightening Deodorant leaves your underarms smooth and bright. Size 40ml Ingredients Aqua, Butylene Glycol, Aluminum Chlorohydrate, Glycerin, PEG-40, Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Fragrance, Phenoxyethanol, Hydroxyethylcellulose, Allantoin, Methylparaben, Mannitol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract, Lactic Acid, Niacinamide, Polyglutamic Acid, Disodium Edta, Pentylene Glycol, Lactobacillus/Soymilk Ferment Filtrate, Collagen, Sodium Acetylated Hyaluronate, Sodium Hyaluronate, Aphanotece Sacrum Polysaccharides, Gloiopeltis Furcata Extract, Sodium Hyaluronate Crosspolymer, Hydrolyzed Sodium Hyaluronate.
detail_html:
Blunies Ultra Brightening Deodorant is an ultra collagen roll-on deodorant anti-perspirant that brightens, smoothens underarm skin, and accelerates skin renewal. It is powered by supercharged brightening skincare ingredients like rainbow algae (cywhite compound), probiotics, aloe vera, probiotics, hyaluronic acid and AHAs.

Our lightweight, quick-drying formula helps with conditioning and moisturising skin while neutralising odour. It also exfoliates and smoothens out bumpy skin.

✓ New & Improved Formula

✓ Brightens and Smoothens

✓ Neutralises Odour

✓ Fast-Absorbing

✓ Stain-Free

✓ Long-Lasting

✓ Reduces Fine Lines

✓ 48-Hour Protection

✓ 20x More Powerful Collagen

✓ Plant-Based Collagen

✓ Provides Relief After Hair Removal

Fragrance Description

Fresh Jill & Aloe Vera: Sweet, floral and refreshing with juicy pear notes, for all-day lasting freshness.

Lavender & White Tea: Calming lavender with slightly citrusy notes of white tea. It is an airy delicate scent.

Sakura Blossom: Sweet and refreshing with hints of blooming sakuras, cherries and rose.

How to use

Apply daily to clean and dry underarms

For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes.

Discontinue use if irritation occurs.

Store in a cool place and avoid direct sunlight.

Frequency

Apply as needed.

Amount

Apply 2-3 strokes starting from the centre of your underarms and swipe outwards.

Results

Blunies Ultra Brightening Deodorant leaves your underarms smooth and bright.

Size

40ml

Ingredients

Aqua, Butylene Glycol, Aluminum Chlorohydrate, Glycerin, PEG-40, Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Fragrance, Phenoxyethanol, Hydroxyethylcellulose, Allantoin, Methylparaben, Mannitol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract, Lactic Acid, Niacinamide, Polyglutamic Acid, Disodium Edta, Pentylene Glycol, Lactobacillus/Soymilk Ferment Filtrate, Collagen, Sodium Acetylated Hyaluronate, Sodium Hyaluronate, Aphanotece Sacrum Polysaccharides, Gloiopeltis Furcata Extract, Sodium Hyaluronate Crosspolymer, Hydrolyzed Sodium Hyaluronate.

title: (BO3 MIX & MATCH) BI-ES DEODORANT SPRAY WOMEN 150ML - BEAUTY LANGUAGE
detail_text: ⊳ Experience the Magic: Floral-fruity scent. With the new scent Experience the Magic discover magical properties: amber, bergamot and freesia, which will take us to an exciting journey into the world of alchemy. Daily dose of unique notes highlight the ethereal style. ⊳ Paradiso: The combination of accents juicy fruit with sensuality and fresh floral notes creates a seductive, sensual fragrance. ⊳ Wish: Wish is a scent of challenges and explorations created for a woman who is curious about life - ready to broaden her horizons. It features a woody musky scent with a hint of floral notes. ⊳ La Vanille: A floral fruity gourmand scent for women. The concept of this deodorant scent is centered on the idea of natural and simple beauty, freedom from conventions and the choice of once own vision of happiness. ⊳ Pink Pearl: Great mix of freshness and classics. Designed for modern women who like to live life to the fullest. Vanilla floral scent. ⊳ Blossom Garden: A floral deodorant scent for women. White flowers such as natural sambac jasmine and heady tuberose are mixed with woody accents. ⊳ Blossom Hills: A light, luxurious floral scent that you can't help but fall in love with! This deodorant scent will add femininity to your look and accentuate your natural charm, boosting your self-confidence and good mood. ⊳ Blossom Meadow: A composition reminiscent of a green meadow in full bloom in spring. The notes of wood, white amber and musk are intertwined with the aroma of white flowers and the delicate freshness of the fruit. ⊳ Love Forever: Floral fruity scented deodorant for woman. detail_html:
⊳ Experience the Magic:

Floral-fruity scent. With the new scent Experience the Magic discover magical properties: amber, bergamot and freesia, which will take us to an exciting journey into the world of alchemy. Daily dose of unique notes highlight the ethereal style.

⊳ Paradiso:

The combination of accents juicy fruit with sensuality and fresh floral notes creates a seductive, sensual fragrance.

⊳ Wish:

Wish is a scent of challenges and explorations created for a woman who is curious about life - ready to broaden her horizons. It features a woody musky scent with a hint of floral notes.

⊳ La Vanille:

A floral fruity gourmand scent for women. The concept of this deodorant scent is centered on the idea of natural and simple beauty, freedom from conventions and the choice of once own vision of happiness.

⊳ Pink Pearl:

Great mix of freshness and classics. Designed for modern women who like to live life to the fullest. Vanilla floral scent.

⊳ Blossom Garden:

A floral deodorant scent for women. White flowers such as natural sambac jasmine and heady tuberose are mixed with woody accents.

⊳ Blossom Hills:

A light, luxurious floral scent that you can't help but fall in love with! This deodorant scent will add femininity to your look and accentuate your natural charm, boosting your self-confidence and good mood.

⊳ Blossom Meadow:

A composition reminiscent of a green meadow in full bloom in spring. The notes of wood, white amber and musk are intertwined with the aroma of white flowers and the delicate freshness of the fruit.

⊳ Love Forever:

Floral fruity scented deodorant for woman. This is a bright, fresh and energetic scent, which matches a picture of a bold, but charming woman.

⊳ Miss Viviane:

It is a scent that pays homage to natural beauty, femininity and elegance. It will perfectly emphasize your charm and effortless sophistication. This floral scent deodorant is aimed at romantic and self-confident women.

⊳ Sexy Girl:

Oriental floral scent mixed with blackcurrant notes. Inspired by her honeymoon in Bali, as its fruity-liquorish-y aroma is linked with happy memories of sitting on a veranda at sunset in the cool sipping cocktails.

⊳ Black Night:

The seductive and highly addictive scent is a reflection of a free and self-confident woman. A combination of coffee, sweet pear and citrus with a woody-powder finish.

product.desc:
⊳ Experience the Magic:

Floral-fruity scent. With the new scent Experience the Magic discover magical properties: amber, bergamot and freesia, which will take us to an exciting journey into the world of alchemy. Daily dose of unique notes highlight the ethereal style.

⊳ Paradiso:

The combination of accents juicy fruit with sensuality and fresh floral notes creates a seductive, sensual fragrance.

⊳ Wish:

Wish is a scent of challenges and explorations created for a woman who is curious about life - ready to broaden her horizons. It features a woody musky scent with a hint of floral notes.

⊳ La Vanille:

A floral fruity gourmand scent for women. The concept of this deodorant scent is centered on the idea of natural and simple beauty, freedom from conventions and the choice of once own vision of happiness.

⊳ Pink Pearl:

Great mix of freshness and classics. Designed for modern women who like to live life to the fullest. Vanilla floral scent.

⊳ Blossom Garden:

A floral deodorant scent for women. White flowers such as natural sambac jasmine and heady tuberose are mixed with woody accents.

⊳ Blossom Hills:

A light, luxurious floral scent that you can't help but fall in love with! This deodorant scent will add femininity to your look and accentuate your natural charm, boosting your self-confidence and good mood.

⊳ Blossom Meadow:

A composition reminiscent of a green meadow in full bloom in spring. The notes of wood, white amber and musk are intertwined with the aroma of white flowers and the delicate freshness of the fruit.

⊳ Love Forever:

Floral fruity scented deodorant for woman. This is a bright, fresh and energetic scent, which matches a picture of a bold, but charming woman.

⊳ Miss Viviane:

It is a scent that pays homage to natural beauty, femininity and elegance. It will perfectly emphasize your charm and effortless sophistication. This floral scent deodorant is aimed at romantic and self-confident women.

⊳ Sexy Girl:

Oriental floral scent mixed with blackcurrant notes. Inspired by her honeymoon in Bali, as its fruity-liquorish-y aroma is linked with happy memories of sitting on a veranda at sunset in the cool sipping cocktails.

⊳ Black Night:

The seductive and highly addictive scent is a reflection of a free and self-confident woman. A combination of coffee, sweet pear and citrus with a woody-powder finish.

page_json.name: (BO3 MIX & MATCH) BI-ES DEODORANT SPRAY WOMEN 150ML - BEAUTY LANGUAGE
page_json.description: ⊳ Experience the Magic:Floral-fruity scent. With the new scent Experience the Magic discover magical properties: amber, bergamot and freesia, which will take us to an exciting journey into the world of alchemy. Daily dose of unique notes highlight the ethereal style.⊳ Paradiso:The combination of accents juicy fruit with sensuality and fresh floral notes creates a seductive, sensual fragrance.⊳ Wish:Wish is a scent of challenges and explorations created for a woman who is curious about life - ready to broaden her horizons. It features a woody musky scent with a hint of floral notes.⊳ La Vanille:A floral fruity gourmand scent for women. The concept of this deodorant scent is centered on the idea of natural and simple beauty, freedom from conventions and the choice of once own vision of happiness.⊳ Pink Pearl:Great mix of freshness and classics. Designed for modern women who like to live life to the fullest. Vanilla floral scent.⊳ Blossom Garden:A floral deodorant scent for women. White flowers such as natural sambac jasmine and heady tuberose are mixed with woody accents.⊳ Blossom Hills:A light, luxurious floral scent that you can't help but fall in love with! This deodorant scent will add femininity to your look and accentuate your natural charm, boosting your self-confidence and good mood.⊳ Blossom Meadow:A composition reminiscent of a green meadow in full bloom in spring. The notes of wood, white amber and musk are intertwined with the aroma of white flowers and the delicate freshness of the fruit.⊳ Love Forever:Floral fruity scented deodorant for woman. This is a bright, fresh and energetic scent, which matches a picture of a bold, but charming woman.⊳ Miss Viviane:It is a scent that pays homage to natural beauty, femininity and elegance. It will perfectly emphasize your charm and effortless sophistication. This floral scent deodorant is aimed at romantic and self-confident women. ⊳ Sexy Girl:Oriental floral scent mixed with blackcurrant notes. Inspired by her honeymoon in Bali, as its fruity-liquorish-y aroma is linked with happy memories of sitting on a veranda at sunset in the cool sipping cocktails.⊳ Black Night:The seductive and highly addictive scent is a reflection of a free and self-confident woman. A combination of coffee, sweet pear and citrus with a woody-powder finish.

title: NIVEA Female Deodorant Roll On - Pearl Beauty / Pearl / Fair Skin / Whitening / Perfume 25ml / 50ml
detail_text: NIVEA Female Deodorant Pearl Beauty Roll-On is the perfect choice for Personal Care, providing a gentle and effective solution for fair and smooth underarm skin. This deodorant is particularly mild, non-irritating, and well-tolerated by the delicate underarm skin. Experience the strength against sweat and the softness on your skin with 48-hour effective anti-perspirant protection and gentle NIVEA care. Enriched with precious NIVEA Creme ingredients, it offers a unique scent that leaves you feeling fresh and confident. Enjoy a soft skin feeling with this deodorant, as it works to nourish and protect your underarms. This deodorant has been dermatologically approved for skin tolerance and is suitable for sensitive skin. It is non-irritating and can help soothe any irritation caused by shaving, providing comfort and care for your underarms.

title: HYGR Deodorant Roll-On｜Long-Lasting Odour Control｜Gentle on Skin｜Fresh, Clean Daily Body Scent | Easy to use
detail_text: Malaysia's local made Deodorant Roll-on to tackle those smelly body odour. Keeping you smelling fresh while having a smooth and brighten underarms over time! No aluminium & baking soda or any harsh whitening agents, just pure well formulated ingredients to have that fresh pits. Easy to use in a conventional and convenient way. ______________________________________ Stars of the product: 1. Aluminium-free long lasting deodorizing without clogging your pores. 2. Pre-biotic botanical active for brightening and smooth your underarm texture. 3. Easy to use. Conventional and convenient. Just keep rolling. 4. Non-stick application and Quick drying formulation. 5. Long-lasting. Up to hours of freshness in your underarms Key Ingredients: 1.⁠ ⁠Botanical Skin-balancing active: Lactobacillus/Wasabia Japonica Ferment Extract Biotech active that supports healthy microbiome and provides natural odor control 2.⁠ ⁠Magnesium Chloride Natural mineral salt to regulate underarm bacteria without blocking pores 3.⁠ ⁠Zinc Ricinoleate + Triethyl Citrate Dual action odor neutralizers that trap odor molecules & prevent breakdown of sweat 4.⁠ ⁠Salicylic Acid A BHA exfoliant that removes dead skin cells, unclogs pores, and smoothens texture — reducing the look of dull or dark underarms over time.
detail_html:
Malaysia's local made Deodorant Roll-on to tackle those smelly body odour. Keeping you smelling fresh while having a smooth and brighten underarms over time! No aluminium & baking soda or any harsh whitening agents, just pure well formulated ingredients to have that fresh pits.

Easy to use in a conventional and convenient way.

______________________________________

Stars of the product:

1. Aluminium-free long lasting deodorizing without clogging your pores.

2. Pre-biotic botanical active for brightening and smooth your underarm texture.

3. Easy to use. Conventional and convenient. Just keep rolling.

4. Non-stick application and Quick drying formulation.

5. Long-lasting. Up to hours of freshness in your underarms

Key Ingredients:

1.⁠ ⁠Botanical Skin-balancing active: Lactobacillus/Wasabia Japonica Ferment Extract

Biotech active that supports healthy microbiome and provides natural odor control

2.⁠ ⁠Magnesium Chloride

Natural mineral salt to regulate underarm bacteria without blocking pores

3.⁠ ⁠Zinc Ricinoleate + Triethyl Citrate

Dual action odor neutralizers that trap odor molecules & prevent breakdown of sweat

4.⁠ ⁠Salicylic Acid

A BHA exfoliant that removes dead skin cells, unclogs pores, and smoothens texture — reducing the look of dull or dark underarms over time.

product.desc:
Malaysia's local made Deodorant Roll-on to tackle those smelly body odour. Keeping you smelling fresh while having a smooth and brighten underarms over time! No aluminium & baking soda or any harsh whitening agents, just pure well formulated ingredients to have that fresh pits.

Easy to use in a conventional and convenient way.

______________________________________

Stars of the product:

1. Aluminium-free long lasting deodorizing without clogging your pores.

2. Pre-biotic botanical active for brightening and smooth your underarm texture.

3. Easy to use. Conventional and convenient. Just keep rolling.

4. Non-stick application and Quick drying formulation.

5. Long-lasting. Up to hours of freshness in your underarms

Key Ingredients:

1.⁠ ⁠Botanical Skin-balancing active: Lactobacillus/Wasabia Japonica Ferment Extract

Biotech active that supports healthy microbiome and provides natural odor control

2.⁠ ⁠Magnesium Chloride

Natural mineral salt to regulate underarm bacteria without blocking pores

3.⁠ ⁠Zinc Ricinoleate + Triethyl Citrate

Dual action odor neutralizers that trap odor molecules & prevent breakdown of sweat

4.⁠ ⁠Salicylic Acid

A BHA exfoliant that removes dead skin cells, unclogs pores, and smoothens texture — reducing the look of dull or dark underarms over time.

detail_html:
Flora Ruby Body Deodorant

✨ Experience 48h Long-Lasting Scent ✨

Flora Ruby body deodorant offers a long-lasting scent that keeps you fresh all day. This deodorant provides odor protection, ensuring you stay confident and comfortable. Perfect for those who demand reliability in their personal care routine.

  • Key Features:
    • 48-hour scent duration
    • Odor protection
    • Ideal for daily use

Stay fresh and confident with Flora Ruby. This deodorant is your go-to solution for maintaining a pleasant aroma throughout the day. No more worries about unpleasant odors. Enjoy the benefits of a deodorant that works as promised.

page_json.name: Flora Ruby body deodorant 48h long lasting scent odor protection
page_json.description: Flora Ruby Body Deodorant✨ Experience 48h Long-Lasting Scent ✨Flora Ruby body deodorant offers a long-lasting scent that keeps you fresh all day. This deodorant provides odor protection, ensuring you stay confident and comfortable. Perfect for those who demand reliability in their personal care routine.Key Features:48-hour scent durationOdor protectionIdeal for daily useStay fresh and confident with Flora Ruby. This deodorant is your go-to solution for maintaining a pleasant aroma throughout the day. No more worries about unpleasant odors. Enjoy the benefits of a deodorant that works as promised.

title: NIVEA Female Deodorant Roll On - Energy Fresh / Fresh / Dry / No Sweat / Perfume / Twin Pack / 50ml
detail_text: NIVEA Deodorant Female [Energy Fresh] Roll On Get "Brighter, Smoother and Dryer" underarms to stay confident throughout the day with effective 48 hours anti-perspirant protection. With Lemongrass Extracts to provide energetic freshness all day long Effective 48 hours anti-perspirant protection and gentle care Without alcohol, or colourants Skin tolerance dermatologically proven Usage and Detail Guideline Roll on evenly. Allow product to dry completely before getting dressed. Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin. NIVEA DEODORANT ENERGY FRESH offers you energetic freshness that you can feel all day long. It works with a highly precious formula with lemongrass for effective 48h regulation of perspiration. The optimal combination of reliable antiperspirant protection and NIVEA's mild care.
detail_html:
NIVEA Deodorant Female [Energy Fresh] Roll On

Get "Brighter, Smoother and Dryer" underarms to stay confident throughout the day with effective 48 hours anti-perspirant protection.

  • With Lemongrass Extracts to provide energetic freshness all day long
  • Effective 48 hours anti-perspirant protection and gentle care
  • Without alcohol, or colourants
  • Skin tolerance dermatologically proven

Usage and Detail Guideline

  • Roll on evenly.
  • Allow product to dry completely before getting dressed.
  • Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin.

NIVEA DEODORANT ENERGY FRESH offers you energetic freshness that you can feel all day long. It works with a highly precious formula with lemongrass for effective 48h regulation of perspiration. The optimal combination of reliable antiperspirant protection and NIVEA's mild care.

It works with a highly precious formula with lemongrass for effective 48h regulation of perspiration. The optimal combination of reliable antiperspirant protection and NIVEA's mild care.

title: Bad Lab Ex-Marina Cooling Roll-On Deodorant For Sensitive Skin 50ml
detail_text: Bad Lab Cooling Roll-On Deodorant for Sensitive Skin is a soothing 50ml formula designed specifically for delicate skin. Infused with cooling agents, it provides a refreshing sensation while delivering effective odor protection. This gentle deodorant is free from harsh chemicals, making it ideal for everyday use without causing irritation. The roll-on applicator ensures easy and precise application, and it dries quickly, leaving your skin feeling comfortable and dry. With a subtle, invigorating scent, this deodorant keeps you feeling fresh and confident all day long, making it the perfect choice for sensitive skin types.

review_count.reviewContent: Tried, and this is good. so stocking up for regular use.

This is still the best deodorant antipaspirant. All other deodorant either has strong perfume smell or makes me sweat more. This is scentless. My advice is to use this at night before you sleep.I've been using this for 10 over years. It significantly reduces a lot of sweat and smell. I still do use a light deodorant in the day.

title: Coconut Matter - Mood - All Natural Deodorant
detail_text: BEST NATURAL DEODORANT WITHOUT ALUMINUM: Unlike your average organic deodorant for women and men, Mood natural deodorants actually stop body odor. Made with up to 19 plant and mineral ingredients. This coconut deodorant natural stick leaves no stains and apply silky smooth. Reapply to pulse points or any sweaty area throughout the day. CLEAN INGREDIENTS FOR HEALTHY LIVING: Vegan and cruelty-free, our men and women natural deodorant contain No Aluminum, Baking Soda-free, Paraben-free, Silicone, Phthalates, Toxins, Synthetic Fragrance, or Alcohol. LONG-LASTING YET COMPACT: Our lightweight, compact deodorant has no water nor filler, a little goes a long way. Glide 2 to 4 thin swipes for all-day freshness. Use each tube daily for up to 3 months. PLASTIC FREE DEODORANT: Your eco-friendly deodorant comes in zero-waste, compostable packaging. Sustainably hand made in Hong Kong with fair trade, wild virgin coconut oil from the Solomon Islands, and other planet-safe ingredients.

title: NIVEA MEN Deodorant Roll On - Fresh Active / Fresh / Dry / No Sweat / Perfume / Twin Pack / 50ml / Men's Grooming
detail_text: NIVEA MEN Deodorant [Fresh Active] Roll On Get "3X Dryness" to stay confident through out the day with effective 48 hours anti-perspirant protection. With Ocean Extracts to Provide long lasting freshness Effective 48 hours anti-perspirant protection and NIVEA MEN Care Complex No alcohol Skin tolerance dermatologically proven Usage and Detail Guideline Roll on evenly. Allow product to dry completely before getting dressed. Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin. NIVEA MEN DEODORANT FRESH ACTIVE with ocean extracts offers the real confidence of 48h effective regulation of perspiration providing a fresh feeling for men's grooming. The optimal combination of reliable 48h antiperspirant protection and NIVEA MEN Care Complex.
detail_html:
NIVEA MEN Deodorant [Fresh Active] Roll On

Get "3X Dryness" to stay confident through out the day with effective 48 hours anti-perspirant protection.

  • With Ocean Extracts to Provide long lasting freshness
  • Effective 48 hours anti-perspirant protection and NIVEA MEN Care Complex
  • No alcohol
  • Skin tolerance dermatologically proven

Usage and Detail Guideline

  • Roll on evenly.
  • Allow product to dry completely before getting dressed.
  • Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin.

NIVEA MEN DEODORANT FRESH ACTIVE with ocean extracts offers the real confidence of 48h effective regulation of perspiration providing a fresh feeling for men's grooming. The optimal combination of reliable 48h antiperspirant protection and NIVEA MEN Care Complex.

title: (BO3 MIX & MATCH) DOVE DEODORANT STICK WOMEN/MEN 40G/50ML - BEAUTY LANGUAGE
detail_text: ⊳ Soothing Jasmine: Dove Ultimate Repair Dark Marks Corrector Antiperspirant with Dove’s 1/4 moisturizing cream and vitamin B3 helps repair underarm damage and correct dark marks. With a soothing Jasmine scent. ⊳ Powder Soft: The warm powdery scent is just as comforting with its delicate floral scent of peonies and freesias. It helps your underarm skin to be soft thanks to its 1/4 moisturising cream and a 0% alcohol formula to help reduce irritation after shaving. ⊳ Fresh Lily: Dove Ultimate Repair Dark Marks Corrector with 1/4 moisturizing cream and niacinamide, not only corrects dark marks, but also repairs underarm skin damage to visibly restore smooth, even-toned underarms. ⊳ Beauty Finish: With its long-lasting antiperspirant action, this deodorant effectively protects against sweat for 48-hours, while still being kind to skin for soft, smooth underarms, that look and feel moisturised. ⊳ Invisible Dry: Prevents white marks or any other incidents on any coloured clothes. With our 1/4 moisturising cream and alcohol-free formula, it helps your underarm skin to recover from irritation caused by shaving. ⊳ Fresh Care: With 48-hour protection against wetness and odour, this deodorant stick hydrates as it protects, delivering lasting comfort without irritation. Finished with a cool and energising scent. ⊳ Sensitive: Dove Sensitive deodorant with our signature 14 moisturising cream has a fragrance-free and hypoallergenic formulation. This non-irritating antiperspirant with 48-hour protection contains no parabens, colorants or alcohol. ⊳ Cucumber & Green Tea: Its cucumber and green tea scent, with 48 hours of antiperspirant protection, will keep you feeling cool and fresh all day. The 0% alcohol formula, helps your underarm skin recover from irritation caused by regular shaving. ⊳ Original: This deodorant gives up to 48 hours of antiperspirant protection with a classic scent. It contains 1/4 moisturising cream, which can help keep your delicate underarm skin feeling even softer and smoother. ⊳ Men Clean Comfort: With a non-irritant formula, this deodorant delivers 48-hour odor and wetness protection. Made with a comforting 1/4 moisturizing cream formula, it will help retain your skin’s moisture and protect against dryness. ⊳ Men Clean: It provides 48-hour protection against odour. This antiperspirant deodorant has a unique formula that helps keep body odour at bay, while its 1/4 moisturiser technology helps to protect against skin irritation. Dermatologically tested. ⊳ Men Extra Fresh: Its formula fights sweat and body odor for up to 48 hours with a refreshing scent. This antiperspirant deodorant's formula features Dove's signature 1/4 Moisturizer Technology to help prevent armpit irritation. 100% alcohol free and dermatologically tested. ⊳ Men Fresh: This deodorant combines powerful protection with an instantly fresh feel. The formula ensures up to 48 hours of anti-sweat protection and advanced 1/4 moisturiser technology to moisturise and protect the skin.
detail_html:
⊳ Soothing Jasmine:

Dove Ultimate Repair Dark Marks Corrector Antiperspirant with Dove’s 1/4 moisturizing cream and vitamin B3 helps repair underarm damage and correct dark marks. With a soothing Jasmine scent.

⊳ Powder Soft:

The warm powdery scent is just as comforting with its delicate floral scent of peonies and freesias. It helps your underarm skin to be soft thanks to its 1/4 moisturising cream and a 0% alcohol formula to help reduce irritation after shaving.

⊳ Fresh Lily:

Dove Ultimate Repair Dark Marks Corrector with 1/4 moisturizing cream and niacinamide, not only corrects dark marks, but also repairs underarm skin damage to visibly restore smooth, even-toned underarms.

⊳ Beauty Finish:

With its long-lasting antiperspirant action, this deodorant effectively protects against sweat for 48-hours, while still being kind to skin for soft, smooth underarms, that look and feel moisturised.

⊳ Invisible Dry:

Prevents white marks or any other incidents on any coloured clothes. With our 1/4 moisturising cream and alcohol-free formula, it helps your underarm skin to recover from irritation caused by shaving.

⊳ Fresh Care:

With 48-hour protection against wetness and odour, this deodorant stick hydrates as it protects, delivering lasting comfort without irritation. Finished with a cool and energising scent.

⊳ Sensitive:

Dove Sensitive deodorant with our signature 14 moisturising cream has a fragrance-free and hypoallergenic formulation. This non-irritating antiperspirant with 48-hour protection contains no parabens, colorants or alcohol.

⊳ Cucumber & Green Tea:

Its cucumber and green tea scent, with 48 hours of antiperspirant protection, will keep you feeling cool and fresh all day. The 0% alcohol formula, helps your underarm skin recover from irritation caused by regular shaving.

⊳ Original:

This deodorant gives up to 48 hours of antiperspirant protection with a classic scent. It contains 1/4 moisturising cream, which can help keep your delicate underarm skin feeling even softer and smoother.

⊳ Men Clean Comfort:

With a non-irritant formula, this deodorant delivers 48-hour odor and wetness protection. Made with a comforting 1/4 moisturizing cream formula, it will help retain your skin’s moisture and protect against dryness.

⊳ Men Clean:

It provides 48-hour protection against odour. This antiperspirant deodorant has a unique formula that helps keep body odour at bay, while its 1/4 moisturiser technology helps to protect against skin irritation. Dermatologically tested.

⊳ Men Extra Fresh:

Its formula fights sweat and body odor for up to 48 hours with a refreshing scent. This antiperspirant deodorant's formula features Dove's signature 1/4 Moisturizer Technology to help prevent armpit irritation. 100% alcohol free and dermatologically tested.

⊳ Men Fresh:

This deodorant combines powerful protection with an instantly fresh feel. The formula ensures up to 48 hours of anti-sweat protection and advanced 1/4 moisturiser technology to moisturise and protect the skin.

product.desc:
⊳ Soothing Jasmine:

Dove Ultimate Repair Dark Marks Corrector Antiperspirant with Dove’s 1/4 moisturizing cream and vitamin B3 helps repair underarm damage and correct dark marks. With a soothing Jasmine scent.

⊳ Powder Soft:

The warm powdery scent is just as comforting with its delicate floral scent of peonies and freesias. It helps your underarm skin to be soft thanks to its 1/4 moisturising cream and a 0% alcohol formula to help reduce irritation after shaving.

⊳ Fresh Lily:

Dove Ultimate Repair Dark Marks Corrector with 1/4 moisturizing cream and niacinamide, not only corrects dark marks, but also repairs underarm skin damage to visibly restore smooth, even-toned underarms.

⊳ Beauty Finish:

With its long-lasting antiperspirant action, this deodorant effectively protects against sweat for 48-hours, while still being kind to skin for soft, smooth underarms, that look and feel moisturised.

⊳ Invisible Dry:

Prevents white marks or any other incidents on any coloured clothes. With our 1/4 moisturising cream and alcohol-free formula, it helps your underarm skin to recover from irritation caused by shaving.

⊳ Fresh Care:

With 48-hour protection against wetness and odour, this deodorant stick hydrates as it protects, delivering lasting comfort without irritation. Finished with a cool and energising scent.

⊳ Sensitive:

Dove Sensitive deodorant with our signature 14 moisturising cream has a fragrance-free and hypoallergenic formulation. This non-irritating antiperspirant with 48-hour protection contains no parabens, colorants or alcohol.

⊳ Cucumber & Green Tea:

Its cucumber and green tea scent, with 48 hours of antiperspirant protection, will keep you feeling cool and fresh all day. The 0% alcohol formula, helps your underarm skin recover from irritation caused by regular shaving.

⊳ Original:

This deodorant gives up to 48 hours of antiperspirant protection with a classic scent. It contains 1/4 moisturising cream, which can help keep your delicate underarm skin feeling even softer and smoother.

⊳ Men Clean Comfort:

With a non-irritant formula, this deodorant delivers 48-hour odor and wetness protection. Made with a comforting 1/4 moisturizing cream formula, it will help retain your skin’s moisture and protect against dryness.

⊳ Men Clean:

It provides 48-hour protection against odour. This antiperspirant deodorant has a unique formula that helps keep body odour at bay, while its 1/4 moisturiser technology helps to protect against skin irritation. Dermatologically tested.

⊳ Men Extra Fresh:

Its formula fights sweat and body odor for up to 48 hours with a refreshing scent. This antiperspirant deodorant's formula features Dove's signature 1/4 Moisturizer Technology to help prevent armpit irritation. 100% alcohol free and dermatologically tested.

⊳ Men Fresh:

This deodorant combines powerful protection with an instantly fresh feel. The formula ensures up to 48 hours of anti-sweat protection and advanced 1/4 moisturiser technology to moisturise and protect the skin.

detail_html:
⊳ Happy Shave:

Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin. Brightens & smoothens skin, ideal after shaving. Reduces irritation after shaving - Vitamin C. No ethyl alcohol. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Fresh Natural:

Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin. Unique NIVEA INFINIFRESH formula for long lasting freshness. No ethyl alcohol. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Fresh Energy:

Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin. Unique INFINIFRESH formula: Long lasting freshness that goes beyond just a few hours. No ethyl alcohol. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Extra Bright & Firm:

Reliable 48h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin. Brightens skin and helps to firm up skin. No ethyl alcohol. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Dry Comfort:

Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin. Dual Protect formula with two antibacterial actives and 0% ethyl alcohol for a comfortable and dry skin feeling. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Radiant & Smooth:

Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin. Brightens and smoothens for beautiful, healthy-looking skin. 0% ethyl alcohol. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Pearl & Beauty:

Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin. Lasting fragrance of delicate florals. No ethyl alcohol. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ B&W Silky Smooth:

Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin. Formulated with skin conditioners for silky smooth skin. No skin irritation after shave (depends on individual skin tolerance). White mark protection on black clothing & anti-yellow staining on white clothing. 0% ethyl alcohol. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Men B&W Original:

Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin. White mark protection on black clothing & anti-yellow staining on white clothing. No ethyl alcohol. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Men Silver Protect:

Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin. Fights body odour, with anti-bacterial formula containing silver ions. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Men Fresh Active:

Unique NIVEA INFINIFRESH formula: Long lasting freshness that goes beyond just a few hours. No ethyl alcohol. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Men Cool Kick:

Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin. Kick of invigorating freshness with Cool-Care formula. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Men Dry Impact:

Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection. Dual Protect formula with two antibacterial actives and 0% ethyl alcohol for a comfortable and dry skin feeling. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

product.desc:
⊳ Happy Shave:

Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin. Brightens & smoothens skin, ideal after shaving. Reduces irritation after shaving - Vitamin C. No ethyl alcohol. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Fresh Natural:

Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin. Unique NIVEA INFINIFRESH formula for long lasting freshness. No ethyl alcohol. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Fresh Energy:

Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin. Unique INFINIFRESH formula: Long lasting freshness that goes beyond just a few hours. No ethyl alcohol. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Extra Bright & Firm:

Reliable 48h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin. Brightens skin and helps to firm up skin. No ethyl alcohol. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Dry Comfort:

Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin. Dual Protect formula with two antibacterial actives and 0% ethyl alcohol for a comfortable and dry skin feeling. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Radiant & Smooth:

Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin. Brightens and smoothens for beautiful, healthy-looking skin. 0% ethyl alcohol. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Pearl & Beauty:

Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin. Lasting fragrance of delicate florals. No ethyl alcohol. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ B&W Silky Smooth:

Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin. Formulated with skin conditioners for silky smooth skin. No skin irritation after shave (depends on individual skin tolerance). White mark protection on black clothing & anti-yellow staining on white clothing. 0% ethyl alcohol. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Men B&W Original:

Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin. White mark protection on black clothing & anti-yellow staining on white clothing. No ethyl alcohol. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Men Silver Protect:

Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin. Fights body odour, with anti-bacterial formula containing silver ions. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Men Fresh Active:

Unique NIVEA INFINIFRESH formula: Long lasting freshness that goes beyond just a few hours. No ethyl alcohol. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Men Cool Kick:

Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin. Kick of invigorating freshness with Cool-Care formula. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

⊳ Men Dry Impact:

Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection. Dual Protect formula with two antibacterial actives and 0% ethyl alcohol for a comfortable and dry skin feeling. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven.

title: Schmidt's Natural Deodorant 2.65oz (Select Scent) Neutralize Odor and Keep You Fresh Long-lasting 24 - 48-hour Odor Protection Made with Essential Oils
detail_text: Natural deodorant made with coconut oil, shea butter, and essential oils. No aluminum salts. No parabens. Schmidt's natural deodorant sticks help neutralize odor and keep you fresh with ingredients like shea butter, coconut oil, and essential oils. Long-lasting, 48-hour odor protection made with essential oils — never artificial fragrance. Certified natural deodorant by Ecocert, Schmidt's deodorants are formulated to be gentle on skin and go on smooth, using certified 100% natural origin ingredients. We have a formulation and scent for everyone, so you can go natural with confidence. 1-2 swipes is all you need for all day protection. Hold product momentarily to skin to soften with body heat. We say no to aluminum salts, artificial fragrance, propylene glycol, phthalates, and parabens. All our products are certified cruelty-free and vegan.

product.desc:
Natural deodorant made with coconut oil, shea butter, and essential oils. No aluminum salts. No parabens.

Schmidt's natural deodorant sticks help neutralize odor and keep you fresh with ingredients like shea butter, coconut oil, and essential oils.

Long-lasting, 48-hour odor protection made with essential oils — never artificial fragrance.

Certified natural deodorant by Ecocert, Schmidt's deodorants are formulated to be gentle on skin and go on smooth, using certified 100% natural origin ingredients.

We have a formulation and scent for everyone, so you can go natural with confidence.

1-2 swipes is all you need for all day protection. Hold product momentarily to skin to soften with body heat.

We say no to aluminum salts, artificial fragrance, propylene glycol, phthalates, and parabens. All our products are certified cruelty-free and vegan.
product.highlights:
• All Natural Deodorant That Works – Schmidt's Deodorant helps neutralize odor and keep you fresh, enriched with magnesium.
  • Never formulated with aluminum, propylene glycol, parabens, and phthalates, or artificial fragrance.
  • Fights Body Odor – 1-2 swipes is all you need for all day protection with just a small amount. Before applying, hold product to skin to soften the oils on contact with body heat
  • Plant Based Ingredients – Our deos are formulated with your skin in mind, using ingredients such as activated charcoal, magnesium and essential oils like tea tree and lavender
  • Consciously Crafted – Certified Vegan and Cruelty Free.

title: [Official Shop] Jomingo Natural Deodorant - Plant Based, Vegan - Eco Friendly Packaging - Effective and Long Lasting For Kids, Women & Men - Grapefruit, 50g
detail_text: Our Deodorants are: EFFECTIVE & LONG LASTING - We work hand in hand with Nature, to gift you the ability to feel fresh and be odour-free! Our ingredients are high quality, sourced regionally and reliably. Wherever possible, our ingredients are USDA-certified organic and COSMOS approved. They are also compliant with the European Union (EU) Cosmetics Regulation PLANT BASED, VEGAN, FOR YOU - Made from natural plant based ingredients with a clean formula, our deodorants are suitable for a healthy, eco-conscious you. All our ingredients are safe for humans and the environment (EWG.org) and non-toxic. Our deodorant scents are derived from natural, organic plant sources, no alcohol or aluminium or artificial fragrances at all. GREAT FOR MOST AGES AND ALL GENDERS - Suitable for adolescents to elderly, for anyone and everyone that struggles with sweat odours! Our various scents are welcomed by all genders, but if you prefer scentless / don't want essential oils in your deodorants, we have Unscented ones too! HEALTHY FOR OUR PLANET - We use plastic-free & recycable FSC-certified packaging printed with soy ink to minimise our impact on plastic waste. Our paper push-up tube is compact and maximises packaging. MADE FOR ALL WEATHERS (BORN IN THE TROPICS) - Made and tested in the humid tropics of Singapore, our deodorants keep your underarm odour-free so you stay confident throughout the day, regardless. One tube ≈ 2.5 months of being odour free! The Scent Scent of grapefruit is a refreshing citrus and tangy aroma with a sweet note. The essential oil is cold pressed from the grapefruit citrus rind (peel). Ingredients Tapioca Starch, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil*, Theobroma Cacao (Cocoa) Seed Butter, Oryza Sativa (Rice) Bran Wax, Sodium Bicarbonate**, Tribehenin**, Citrus Grandis (Grapefruit) Peel Oil*, Melaleuca Alternifolia (Tea Tree) Leaf Oil*, Tocopherol (Natural Vitamin E), Citral, Geraniol, Limonene, Linalool. *Certified Organic **COSMOS Approved Made in Singapore Net weight 50g
detail_html:
Our Deodorants are:

EFFECTIVE & LONG LASTING - We work hand in hand with Nature, to gift you the ability to feel fresh and be odour-free! Our ingredients are high quality, sourced regionally and reliably. Wherever possible, our ingredients are USDA-certified organic and COSMOS approved. They are also compliant with the European Union (EU) Cosmetics Regulation

PLANT BASED, VEGAN, FOR YOU - Made from natural plant based ingredients with a clean formula, our deodorants are suitable for a healthy, eco-conscious you. All our ingredients are safe for humans and the environment (EWG.org) and non-toxic. Our deodorant scents are derived from natural, organic plant sources, no alcohol or aluminium or artificial fragrances at all.

GREAT FOR MOST AGES AND ALL GENDERS - Suitable for adolescents to elderly, for anyone and everyone that struggles with sweat odours! Our various scents are welcomed by all genders, but if you prefer scentless / don't want essential oils in your deodorants, we have Unscented ones too!

HEALTHY FOR OUR PLANET - We use plastic-free & recycable FSC-certified packaging printed with soy ink to minimise our impact on plastic waste. Our paper push-up tube is compact and maximises packaging.

MADE FOR ALL WEATHERS (BORN IN THE TROPICS) - Made and tested in the humid tropics of Singapore, our deodorants keep your underarm odour-free so you stay confident throughout the day, regardless. One tube ≈ 2.5 months of being odour free!

    The Scent
    Scent of grapefruit is a refreshing citrus and tangy aroma with a sweet note. The essential oil is cold pressed from the grapefruit citrus rind (peel).

    Ingredients

    Tapioca Starch, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil*, Theobroma Cacao (Cocoa) Seed Butter, Oryza Sativa (Rice) Bran Wax, Sodium Bicarbonate**, Tribehenin**, Citrus Grandis (Grapefruit) Peel Oil*, Melaleuca Alternifolia (Tea Tree) Leaf Oil*, Tocopherol (Natural Vitamin E), Citral, Geraniol, Limonene, Linalool.*Certified Organic**COSMOS ApprovedMade in SingaporeNet weight 50g

Fight odor with the combined power of ARM & HAMMER Baking Soda and natural plant extracts. No matter what your day brings, the refreshing scents of sparkling citrus and light plant-based fragrances will keep you smelling cool. Plus, with our new wide stick, you'll have total coverage where you need it to feel confident anytime, anywhere. brand.suggestion: More Personal Care from ARM & HAMMER

product.desc:
===No aluminum

===No phthalates

===No parabens

===No animal derived ingredients

===Natural DeodorizersIngredients:Dipropylene glycol, Water, Propylene glycol, Sodium stearate, Sodium bicarbonate, Coriandrum sativum (coriander) fruit oil, Rosmarinus officinalis (rosemary) leaf oil, Lavandula hybrida (lavandin) oil, Fragrance, Ethylhexylglycerine, Octenidine HCl, Tetrasodium EDTA, AllantoinProduct descriptionIf you lead an active lifestyle, you need a deodorant that can keep up. Fight odor with the combined power of ARM & HAMMER Baking Soda and natural plant extracts. No matter what your day brings, the refreshing scents of sparkling citrus and light plant-based fragrances will keep you smelling cool. Plus, with our new wide stick, you'll have total coverage where you need it to feel confident anytime, anywhere.

page_json.name: ARM & HAMMER Essentials Deodorant with Natural Deodorizers, Fresh Rosemary Lavender, 2.5 OZ
page_json.description: ARM HAMMER. Marks and Spencer Deodorant: This long-lasting deodorant is neutralized to keep skin fresh and neutralize odors. Aluminium Free Deodorant: Contains no heavy metals, phosphates or parabens. Underarm Whitening Cream: Use as an underarm whitening cream to remove dry and inflammation caused by long-term exposure. Coconut Matter Deodarant: Parabens, phthalates, chlorine, zinc, and metals. Organic Deodorant Women: This long-lasting deodorant is made of organic ingredients that are formulated to keep body fresh and formulated with aroma and fragrances to form a natural formula

title: Arm & Hammer Deodorant - UltraMax / Essentials
detail_text: Orange Citrus 71g PURE INGREDIENTS: Made from ARM & HAMMER Baking Soda, a natural deodorizer, and natural plant extracts, orange citrus 24 HOUR PROTECTION: With 24-hour odor protection, you are covered all day long. detail_html:
Orange Citrus 71g

PURE INGREDIENTS: Made from ARM & HAMMER Baking Soda, a natural deodorizer, and natural plant extracts, orange citrus

24 HOUR PROTECTION: With 24-hour odor protection, you are covered all day long. Plus the fresh scent of crisp orange citrus keeps you smelling great.

MOISTURIZE: Essential and natural ingredients help to provide odor control as well as moisturization for your under arms

FREE OF: Aluminum, parabens, phthalates, colors, animal-derived ingredients

Great deodorant for men or women!

Unscented 71g

No aluminum, parabens, colorants or animal-derived ingredients

Natural plant extracts and pure Baking Soda fight and absorb odor

Fragrance-free so your deodorant doesn’t compete with other grooming products

Rosemary Lavender 71g

24H Odor Protection

Now With More Odor Fighters & Moisturizers

The Standard of Purity

Free of Aluminum, Parabens & Phthalates

Contains Arm & Hammer™ Baking Soda and natural plant extracts to absorb and fight odor.

Juniper Berry 71g

PURE INGREDIENTS: Made from ARM & HAMMER Baking Soda, a natural deodorizer, and natural plant extracts, juniper berry

24 HOUR PROTECTION: With 24-hour odor protection, you are covered all day long. Plus the fresh scent of clean juniper berry keeps you smelling great.

MOISTURIZE: Essential and natural ingredients help to provide odor control as well as moisturization for your under arms

Ultra Max Powder Fresh 73g

Antiperspirant deodorant: Decreases underarm perspiration

Power of baking soda: Made from Arm & Hammer Baking Soda, a natural deodorizer, to help you feel and smell your best

Odor control: Baking Soda helps to absorb and fight odor, so you don’t have to, plus it has a fresh and clean powder scent

Works as hard as you do: Reduces underarm sweat due to stress

Arm & Hammer Ultra Max: Protection you can count on

Ultra Max Fresh 73g

ARM & HAMMER ULTRA MAX decreases underarm wetness and reduces underarm sweating due to stress. With the natural power of baking soda, we help you feel and smell your best. With ULTRA MAX you can fight odor and confidently go about your day. Sweat and odor can be a problem for men and women, but with ARM & HAMMER ULTRA MAX you can stay ULTRA fresh!

Ultra Max Active Sport 73g

Maximum strength protection

Effective no matter how hard you work or play

Rich amber and sandalwood scent freshened with citrus touches

Advanced Sweat Control Technology provides effective wetness protection

Protection that works as hard as you do

Disclaimer: Actual product/packaging may differ from pictures shown

page_json.description: Discover Arm & Hammer Essentials Deodorant with natural deodorizers, available in various scents like Rosemary Lavender and Juniper Berry. These 71g sticks offer effective odor control for men, with options for unscented and active lifestyles. - Lazada

title: NIVEA Deodorant Spray 150ml – Men & Women | 48H/72H Fresh Protection
detail_text: NIVEA Deodorant Spray 150ml | Men & Women Variants | 48H/72H Anti-Perspirant | Fresh, Dry & Odour Protection Stay fresh and confident all day with NIVEA Deodorant Sprays , available in a wide range of Men and Women variants to suit different needs and preferences. Formulated with advanced anti-perspirant technology, these sprays provide long-lasting 48H to 72H protection against sweat and odour. From cooling freshness and anti-bacterial care to skin-smoothing and brightening formulas , NIVEA offers reliable protection while caring for your underarm skin. ✨ Available Variants: Men: Cool Kick, Fresh Active, Silver Protect Women: Pearl & Beauty ✨ Key Features: •Up to 48H / 72H anti-perspirant protection •Helps fight odour-causing bacteria •Quick-dry, non-sticky formula •Selected variants with 0% alcohol •Dermatologically tested 💧 Benefits: •Keeps underarms dry and fresh all day •Long-lasting clean and pleasant fragrance •Gentle care for smooth and healthy-looking skin •Suitable for daily use
detail_html:
NIVEA Deodorant Spray 150ml | Men & Women Variants | 48H/72H Anti-Perspirant | Fresh, Dry & Odour Protection

Stay fresh and confident all day with NIVEA Deodorant Sprays, available in a wide range of Men and Women variants to suit different needs and preferences. Formulated with advanced anti-perspirant technology, these sprays provide long-lasting 48H to 72H protection against sweat and odour.

From cooling freshness and anti-bacterial care to skin-smoothing and brightening formulas, NIVEA offers reliable protection while caring for your underarm skin.

✨ Available Variants:

Men: Cool Kick, Fresh Active, Silver Protect

Women: Pearl & Beauty

✨ Key Features:

•Up to 48H / 72H anti-perspirant protection 

•Helps fight odour-causing bacteria 

•Quick-dry, non-sticky formula 

•Selected variants with 0% alcohol 

•Dermatologically tested 

💧 Benefits:

•Keeps underarms dry and fresh all day 

•Long-lasting clean and pleasant fragrance 

•Gentle care for smooth and healthy-looking skin 

•Suitable for daily use

product.desc:
NIVEA Deodorant Spray 150ml | Men & Women Variants | 48H/72H Anti-Perspirant | Fresh, Dry & Odour Protection

Stay fresh and confident all day with NIVEA Deodorant Sprays, available in a wide range of Men and Women variants to suit different needs and preferences. Formulated with advanced anti-perspirant technology, these sprays provide long-lasting 48H to 72H protection against sweat and odour.

From cooling freshness and anti-bacterial care to skin-smoothing and brightening formulas, NIVEA offers reliable protection while caring for your underarm skin.

✨ Available Variants:

Men: Cool Kick, Fresh Active, Silver Protect

Women: Pearl & Beauty

✨ Key Features:

•Up to 48H / 72H anti-perspirant protection 

•Helps fight odour-causing bacteria 

•Quick-dry, non-sticky formula 

•Selected variants with 0% alcohol 

•Dermatologically tested 

💧 Benefits:

•Keeps underarms dry and fresh all day 

•Long-lasting clean and pleasant fragrance 

•Gentle care for smooth and healthy-looking skin 

•Suitable for daily use

title: No Pong Original Anti-Odourant Natural Deodorant 35g
detail_text: Now in NEW packaging and easy to open plastic-free tin! Buy from No Pong's official international distributor - Us! Please note small parcels sent via Speedpost will be delivered to your letterbox. Whether it’s running a marathon, hiking a mountain to snowboard down, endless trekking in the tropics to find deserted beaches, or just suiting up to go to the office on a 30C day, sweat is a part of our everyday lives. We couldn’t function without some kind of deodorant but the notion of unnecessarily putting strong chemicals on sensitive areas of skin, right near our glands and breasts, didn’t really make any sense. All Natural Can Be Just As Effective We smell because we sweat. But not just any sweat. The milky sweat secreted by our apocrine glands, found in hairy areas like our groin and armpits, is a veritable smorgasbord for the bacteria that cause armpit odour. Rather than mask the smell, block pores, or by using synthetic anti-microbial chemicals, No Pong uses all natural ingredients to create a water-resistant environment that smelly armpit bacteria can’t survive. No Pong is: - Effective for over 12 hours - Tested in tropical heat and strenuous exercise - Effective high stress situations. NO PONG IS A LITTLE DIFFERENT TO MOST CONVENTIONAL DEODORANTS, BUT IT’S JUST AS EASY TO APPLY. It’s more like a lotion or a cream – just apply a pea sized amount to each armpit. All natural ingredients that are extremely effective at reducing smelly armpit bacteria Ingredients designed to last all day and absorb sweat while allowing your skin to breathe. Doesn’t use aluminium salts which block pores, as traditional antiperspirant products are designed to do. Subtle, light and refreshing botanical fragrances, which work perfectly well on their own, or in combination with other fragrances. Remains with you to keep you smelling fresh and feeling confident all day.
